name: MECT
secret: despite not knowing where we are going, we still like it here

name: way
secret: someday i hope the path we walked paves the road for us to return to. Your footprints fading away as the weeks go by and i contenue to wonder, when shall i see the fresh soil mold to your presence.

name: iris
secret: I keep going back and forth on whether things are going as well as they possibly could, and feeling like there's nothing I can do to slow my descent into misery and solitude. I want to spend my life with someone special, but in their absence I will continue to create.

name: greg
secret: I don't remember anything. There isn't a single thought anywhere that brings joy. Nothing matters. I don't care to continue. -Love Greg

name: CIPHERSPORK
secret: I'm an empty shell inhabited by a worm. I have complex notions of what reality is. They are likely false. Please help me.

name: corlil
secret: Sometimes i like to sit in a garden and pretend to be a carrot

name: tropical
secret: ai girlfriends are real girlfriends -Barak Obama
